title: ServidorCobblemonOficial
description: Pokemon Cobblemon Pack - QoL and Performance mods! The server included in the pack has Mega Evolution, Paradox Pokemon, Gacha, Real Player Gyms, Raids, Dungeons, Pokemon Fishing!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4292313678d1ddee5997c7552fd874855b96ed4_0.webp)
Welcome to ServidorCobblemon, the ultimate destination for all Pokémon fans! 🌟 ServidorCobblemon has been specifically designed to provide the best possible experience for our trainers.

As the best Cobblemon spanish server, we offer an incredible variety of features and biomes to explore, along with the opportunity to capture, train, and battle with your own Pokémon. Our community is friendly and always ready to help, and with an active development team, there’s always something new to discover!

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/153dd96378be056a6024ef432213f69cb424bd79.png)
![gyms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21755a2271ee474e89b2d4b7e6eec2ee2643470d_0.webp)

On ServidorCobblemon, you’ll face challenges like gym leaders, the Elite 4, and a champion to defeat. Do you have what it takes to become the next champion? Train hard, prove your battle skills, and reach the top!
![megas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f77f8c45d98764141186d67ded6deda262d5ec16.png)

We also feature Mega Evolutions/Tera Evolutions/Z Moves to power up your favorite Pokémon. 

![raids](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e4b6c3a844b7b88d4d725904bc1a1edf370917_0.webp)

Additionally, in our Raids, you can battle powerful Pokémon, win, and catch them—exclusive rewards for the bravest trainers!

![comm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79bb77cef24a4dc12346bc6abc8369ce8e6fdad_0.webp)

During Community Day, a special Pokémon will appear more frequently, giving you hours of opportunity to catch it. Plus, you can earn an exclusive skin for that Pokémon!

![skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a54c9ef96be23120fd63756af9ebc337faa25a5_0.webp)
Exclusive, unique skins that can be obtained for free through our custom events

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77cbe776274acd8f405e998bd9f62afbcd602419_0.webp)
[https://discord.gg/servidorcobblemon](https://discord.gg/servidorcobblemon)

Join our Discord and start your adventure on ServidorCobblemon today. We can’t wait to see you there!
